chunks.text: Josephine Williamson wins Chancellor's Outstanding Staff Award - EECS at Berkeley Josephine Williamson, the EECS Director of Administrative Services, has been selected to receive the U.C. Berkeley Chancellor’s Outstanding Staff Award (COSA), which is the highest honor bestowed upon staff by the Chancellor. COSAs are presented to individuals and teams who, in addition to performing their normal job duties with excellence, also demonstrate exceptional initiative in contributing to the UC Berkeley campus community. Categories Honors View Open Faculty Positions
